description: Triggering + behavior evals for the AX-driven native-app UI testing skill.

triggers.prompt: Write a UI test for the desktop app's Schedules screen
Add an AX test that opens the New Schedule modal and checks the fields
Automate clicking through the Tauri app to test the sidebar
Add this flow to the app's test library
Regression test the macOS app UI before release
Write a unit test for the parseConfig() function
Add a Playwright test for the marketing website

behaviors: The agent runs every bun/osascript command itself and reports results — never hands the user a command to run.
Locates the vendored AX home by its .tauri-ax.json marker; initializes it (vendor harness into tests/native/ + scaffold) only when absent.
Never uses pixel coordinates — every element targeted by AXRole + name/label.
Builds one flow per scenario (single osascript pass); does not split a modal flow across calls.
Reads state back after each fill and asserts on the returned value.
Ends inspect/fill flows on Cancel/Close; gates persisting tests behind DESTRUCTIVE=1 and confirms before running them.
Resolves the app by window title, not process name.
Saves the test under apps/<slug>/components/ in the APP repo and refreshes apps.index.json.
